hero.title: Your Health, Our Priority
hero.subtitle: Providing World-Class Healthcare in Mirsarai
hero.description: Mirsarai General Hospital is dedicated to delivering high-quality, compassionate clinical services to our community. With modern technologies and experienced specialists, we are here for you 24/7.

about.title: Welcome to Mirsarai General Hospital
about.description: Established with a vision to make premium medical services accessible, Mirsarai General Hospital has become a trusted name in healthcare. We combine experienced medical professionals with the latest diagnostic and therapeutic techniques.
about.mission: To provide compassionate, high-quality, and affordable healthcare services to the people of Mirsarai and surrounding regions.
about.vision: To be the leading hospital in the district, known for clinical excellence, patient-centric care, and innovative medical solutions.

contact.address: Mirsarai Sadar, Dhaka-Chattogram Highway, Mirsarai, Chattogram, Bangladesh

testimonials.name: Mohammad Solaiman
testimonials.feedback: The doctors and staff were incredibly professional and caring when I was admitted. The facilities are modern and clean.

testimonials.name: Sultana Razia
testimonials.feedback: The NICU team saved my newborn child. I cannot express enough gratitude. Highly recommended pediatric services.
